chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 44 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case For hearing of main case 30.10.2023 Mr. Shahab Sarki, Advocate for applicants..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel submits that case is reached final stage, and he has no instructions. Therefore, for want of instructions, this application is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E Abdul Basit
